title: Resolve Heltec Wireless Tracker bridge mapping
description: The heltec_wireless_tracker bridge fragment has no canonical Zephyr target. Validate a real board definition and radio/GNSS wiring or explicitly retire it.
acceptance_criteria: Canonical target builds and reaches bridge runtime oracle, or approved retirement removes fragment and support claims.
close_reason: Retired orphaned firmware/bridge-zephyr/boards/heltec_wireless_tracker.{conf,overlay} (no canonical Zephyr board target; 99 lines removed). Acceptance met via explicit retirement. No other references or support claims affected. Resolves mapping for closed parent 2u26.
